raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year> I signed up for a Financial Package for {$5000.00} On XXXX XXXX I tried calling the principle of the company with NO response. 
On XX/XX/XXXX I called Citi Bank Customer Service and asked to CANCEL and Reverse the charges. 
Citi temporarily reverse the charges, then recharge the Acct.a month later. 
For 13 months months I have been back and forth with CITI without any resolve. 
This has affected my CREDIT ; also CITI dropped my Credit Line from {$17000.00} to {$6100.00}.
